name: Popcorn Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12x15-inch roasting pan, combine honey, butter, and vanilla. Place in the oven and turn heat on to 350°F. Meanwhile, whirl corn in a blender or food processor until finely ground. When butter is melted, about 5 minutes later, add to the pan the ground corn, oats, coconut, bran cereal, wheat cereal, raisins, and sesame seeds; mix well.
2. Bake in a 350°F oven, stirring often, until richly browned, 40-45 minutes. Cool; serve. If made ahead, store airtight at room temperature up to 3 weeks. Makes 11 cups.
